finding_results.notes: Cash continuity now carries Chapter 7 entry state forward by distinguishing road cash from sealed reserve cash, then reconciling later arithmetic explicitly.
Shop action is now diagnosis/quote only; front-pad work is shown as Eli's overnight DIY attempt with persistent soft pedal, creating a single causal origin into Chapter 9.
Ring-sale decision beat now stays in immediate practical pressure (hold clock, storm travel, bodily unease) without abstract moral adjudication.
Brake timeline is now contradiction-free: no shop-installed front pads, then explicit night DIY front-pad swap, then dawn departure with quieter but still soft brakes.
Back-to-back suppression templates were replaced with concrete action and memory beats, preserving recoil without formulaic cadence.

summary: Revised Chapter 8 to resolve all packet findings by repairing cash causality, enforcing one brake-repair chain into Chapter 9 (shop diagnosis only, then overnight DIY front-pad swap), removing suppression-template repetition, and replacing abstract moral cushioning in the pawn-sale decision with immediate embodied consequence.
